title: Carrier Global vs. Owens Corning: Which Industrials Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
author: Brendan Coffey
description: Carrier Global and Owens Corning are compared as infrastructure investment options. Carrier Global is pivoting toward climate solutions with strong AI data center demand (500%+ growth), while Owens Corning faces headwinds from construction cyclicality and a recent net loss. Carrier trades at a forward P/E of 24x (below sector average of 30.4x), while Owens Corning is cheaper at 12.5x but struggles with weaker residential demand and customer concentration risks.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong growth in AI data center business (500%+ increase), expanding heat pump demand in Europe, strategic pivot to higher-margin climate solutions, and valuation below sector average despite revenue decline. Management expects AI sector to contribute over $1.5 billion in revenue.

Reported net loss of $522 million in FY 2025 with negative 5.2% net margin, revenue declined 8%, high customer concentration risk (two customers represent 28% of sales), exposure to construction cyclicality, and litigation risks from fire safety issues with Paroc subsidiary.
Mentioned as a major competitor to Carrier Global in the HVAC and climate solutions market, but no specific performance data or analysis provided in the article.
Mentioned as a competitor to Carrier Global, but no specific performance analysis provided. The Motley Fool has positions in this company.
Mentioned as a competitor to Owens Corning in building materials, but no specific performance data or analysis provided in the article.

title: Johnson Controls Announces Quarterly Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI) announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, payable on July 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026. The company has maintained consecutive dividend payments since 1887.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement of a regular quarterly dividend demonstrates financial stability and commitment to returning value to shareholders. The company's 139-year history of consecutive dividend payments indicates strong financial health and investor confidence.

title: Mass Notification System Market by Software, Hardware, Application - Global Forecast to 2030
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global Mass Notification System (MNS) market is expected to grow from $28.88 billion in 2025 to $80.44 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 22.7%. Growth is driven by stringent regulatory requirements, cloud deployment acceleration, and the dominance of voice communication. North America leads the market while Asia Pacific shows the fastest growth. Key players are enhancing offerings with advanced technologies to meet compliance and safety mandates.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Named as a key player enhancing MNS solutions, well-positioned to benefit from stringent regulatory demands and the shift toward cloud-based, scalable notification systems.
Listed among leading MNS vendors with opportunities to grow through cloud deployment acceleration and integration of real-time threat intelligence in unified communication platforms.
Identified as a key player in the MNS market, positioned to benefit from increased adoption across regulated sectors like healthcare, education, and transportation.
Listed as a key MNS provider with opportunities in building automation integration and compliance-aligned notification workflows across critical infrastructure sectors.
Included among key MNS market players, positioned to benefit from growing demand for secure, compliance-ready communication platforms in regulated industries.
Listed as a key player enhancing MNS offerings with new technologies to meet compliance and safety mandates, positioning the company to benefit from the 22.7% CAGR market growth.

title: HVAC Market Opportunity Report 2026: Surge in Urban Development, Energy Efficiency, and Smart Technologies Drive Expansion - Growth Analysis and Forecasts 2025-2035
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global HVAC market is projected to grow from USD 524.9 billion in 2025 to USD 1.2 trillion by 2035, driven by rapid urbanization, energy efficiency demands, and smart technology adoption. The air conditioning equipment segment leads with USD 215.8 billion in 2025, while the indirect distribution channel dominates with 74% market share. The U.S. market alone is valued at USD 156.9 billion and expected to grow at 10.2% CAGR.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Major HVAC manufacturer benefiting from increased demand for energy-efficient cooling solutions and smart HVAC technologies in expanding markets.
Major HVAC manufacturer well-positioned in a market expected to reach USD 1.2 trillion by 2035 with strong growth in energy-efficient systems.
Major HVAC manufacturer positioned to benefit from strong market growth at 8.1% CAGR and increasing demand for advanced environmental control systems.

title: Marine HVAC Market Report 2026: Industry Analysis and Growth Outlook 2021-2031 | Rising Integration of Smart, AI-Driven Climate Control Systems
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global Marine HVAC market is projected to grow from USD 3.05 billion in 2025 to USD 3.92 billion by 2031 at a CAGR of 4.27%, driven by rising maritime trade, fleet renewal, and demand for energy-efficient climate control systems. However, high initial installation costs and retrofitting challenges for older vessels remain significant obstacles to market adoption.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a major player in the Marine HVAC market, positioned to benefit from growth drivers including smart climate control integration and strict environmental compliance requirements.
